item.title: City_Xtra: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 5min #ManCity are closely monitoring Bayer Leverkusen’s Ibrahim Maza. While there has been no clu
item.description:
City Xtra @City_Xtra · 5min #ManCity are closely monitoring Bayer Leverkusen’s Ibrahim Maza. While there has been no club-to-club contact yet, he is one to watch ahead of the summer.
[via @Plettigoal ] 17 15 157 4 mil

item.title: Plettigoal: Florian Plettenberg @Plettigoal · 6min Vincent Kompany has suggested reconsidering the yellow card rules in the Champio
item.description:
Florian Plettenberg @Plettigoal · 6min Vincent Kompany has suggested reconsidering the yellow card rules in the Champions League:
“We have more matches in the group stage, yet it’s still three cards. If you make it this far as a centre-back with three yellow cards, you’ve actually done a good job, and still you Mostrar más 7 18 270 16 mil

item.title:
fplblackbox_az: Az @fplblackbox_az · 13min I cannot believe the amount of FHs I’m seeing with no Brighton players.
Spurs are absolute d
item.description:
Az @fplblackbox_az · 13min I cannot believe the amount of FHs I’m seeing with no Brighton players.
Spurs are absolute dog shit, Chelsea aren’t much better.
I think we win both. Fight me if you disagree 13 26 4 mil
